examples: The Botai were the first to domesticate horses?
If you domesticate this raccoon, it will have trouble living in the wild.
Can we, somehow, resist the powers that conspire to domesticate us?
' I did master the principles of how to domesticate a man.
Even then, to his credit, Ang Lee is never tempted to domesticate this cat, except briefly, when both boy and beast are starving and at death's door.
